input.headlineLead: Hand your design to an AI director —
input.tagline: Paste a website link, or drop in a screenshot. Professional scoring across six dimensions, plus a fix list you can act on right away.
input.urlHintS1: After you enter a link we
input.urlHintS2: , then run a visual review on that screenshot with on-image annotation. If the page needs login or capture fails, it falls back to a text-only review — in that case
input.dropTitle: Drop a screenshot here, or click to choose
input.dropHint: PNG / JPG · full-page or single screen both work
input.promptToggleShow: View the prompt sent to the review agent ▾
input.promptHint: This is the full instruction sent to the review agent on click (with strict output-format constraints baked in). To wire in your own review agent, just forward this together with the link / image.

analyzing.title: The director is reviewing…
analyzing.shooting: Opening the page and capturing it…
steps: Walking the flow as a user…
Tracing the conversion path for drop-offs…

error.title: The review didn't go through
error.body: The AI didn't return a valid result — usually a network or parsing hiccup. Trying again normally fixes it.

result.suggestionsSubtitle: Sorted by priority — work top to bottom.

canvas.title: Annotate on the design
canvas.subtitle: Colored boxes are issues the agent flagged; draw your own box to comment, then send it to the agent for targeted advice.
canvas.annotateOn: ✓ Annotating · drag to draw a box
canvas.markersLoading: Locating the problem areas on the image…
canvas.markersFailedText: Annotation locating timed out or failed.
canvas.markerHelp: Click any item to show / hide its box on the left.
canvas.markerToggleTitle: Click to show / hide this box
canvas.commentPlaceholder: What's wrong here? How should the agent change it?
canvas.noCommentsS2: in the top right, drag a box on the image, write your question, then send it to the agent.
